# trag.dev

> Personal site of Chris Trag — Head of Developer Evangelism at Amazon for Alexa+, Apps & Games.

This is a static personal site built with Eleventy and Pico CSS. It's designed to be forked and remixed.

## Pages

- [Home](https://trag.dev/): Bio, social links, and background
- [Speaking](https://trag.dev/speaking/): Talks, panels, and interviews
- [Writing](https://trag.dev/writing/): Articles and blog posts
- [Shelf](https://trag.dev/shelf/): Book recommendations

## Remix This Site

This site is open source and designed to be remixed. For instructions on how to create your own version, see the REMIX guide:

- [REMIX.md](https://github.com/chris-trag/chris-trag.github.io/blob/main/.github/REMIX.md): Step-by-step instructions for AI agents to remix this site
- [README](https://github.com/chris-trag/chris-trag.github.io/blob/main/README.md): Project overview, structure, and customization guide
- [Source code](https://github.com/chris-trag/chris-trag.github.io): Full repo on GitHub

## Tech Stack

- Static site generator: Eleventy (11ty) v2
- CSS framework: Pico CSS with custom theme
- Fonts: Work Sans (self-hosted)
- Icons: Flaticon UIcons (self-hosted, subset)
- Deployment: GitHub Actions to GitHub Pages

## Contact

- Email: chris@trag.dev
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/ctraganos
- Bluesky: bsky.app/profile/trag.dev
